query: SELECT gameId, side, pitcherName, mlbamId, retrosheetId, kProj, bookLine, pOver, pUnder, verdict, bestSide, bestEdge FROM mlb_strikeout_props WHERE gameId IN (2250007, 2250008, 2250009) ORDER BY gameId, side;
